role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in investments that provide exposure to the iShares Russell 2000 ETF. The fund invests in FLEX Options on the Underlying ETF. FLEX Options are exchange-traded option contracts with uniquely customizable terms. The fund is non-diversified.

info.longName: Innovator U.S. Small Cap 10 Buffer ETF - Quarterly
